sections.heading: Intro
sections.text:
This article is about the collection of short stories. For the individual short story, see His Last Bow (story)
Also of note is John Watson 's statement in the last story of the cycle that Sherlock Holmes has retired, and forbids him to publish any more stories.

sections.heading: Contents
sections.text: 1 Preface 2 Stories in the Book 3 See also 4 Notes

sections.heading: Preface
sections.text: The book contains a short preface that reads as follows:

sections.heading: Stories in the Book
sections.text: " The Adventure of Wisteria Lodge " " The Adventure of the Cardboard Box " " The Adventure of the Red Circle " " The Adventure of the Bruce-Partington Plans " (Mycroft appears) " The Adventure of the Dying Detective " " The Disappearance of Lady Frances Carfax " " The Adventure of the Devil's Foot " " His Last Bow " (told in third-person)

sections.heading: Notes
sections.text: ↑ Originally published simply as "A Reminiscence of Mr Sherlock Holmes", this story is made up of two parts given separate titles: "The Singular Experience of Mr John Scott Eccles" and "The Tiger of San Pedro" ↑ In American Edition only.
